text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...A dessert themed around the school... Something's missing, but what?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Father? Hallo?

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
Hallo, mein Schatz. I heard about the contest from an associate at
Spring Confectioners. How's it going?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it's all going to plan. I promise to achieve stunning results and
make the event a success.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Is that so... Flash, you know of Schwarzwälder Kirschtorte, yes?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Yes. It's a well-known cake based on the Black Forest region in
Baden-Württemberg, isn't it? Made with the local specialty, cherry
liquor.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
That's right. It's said that the cream stands for fallen snow, chocolate
chips for the fallen leaves, and the cherries themselves make for a
large portion of the region's livelihood.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
Although I am not from Baden-Württemberg, I get a real sense of the
Black Forest when I eat it.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
The cold snow, the dense foliage, the cherry orchards... I'm moved to
think that they've been there, loved and respected, for centuries.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Father...

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the Black Forest, Tracen Academy doesn't have centuries of
history or any local produce, so it might be hard to reach the same
level of depth with your cake...

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
But I am sure there is plenty one could be moved by at the academy,
because it's a wonderful place where wonderful students like you
come together.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: If I were you, I would start by looking for what that is.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So, I think that rather than using a simple theme like racing or the
grounds, we need to think of something that will speak to the heart.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And that's what I'd like to ask you all about. What moves you about
Tracen Academy? Or rather, what is the academy's charm?

text_block_list.name: The Four
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...!
This is rather unexpected... I didn't think we'd get such different
answers. Hm...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I think we should narrow it down to one theme. We'll either have to
choose one, or find a common thread that ties them all together.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
First, we could interview each team member and narrow down our
choices based on the results. Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have a suggestion. There is a more efficient method than doing
individual interviews.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: GOOD MOOORNING!

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text: Good morning.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"7:50 a.m.—Bakushin O stands at the school gates and greets arriving
students for thirty minutes."

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! This is my morning routine! Everything starts with a greeting! That
goes without saying for an honor student like myself!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime, everyone! I'll collect all your Japanese homework! Step
riiight up and leave it in my hands!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Oh, I nearly forgot to turn it in! Thanks, Bakushin, you're a lifesaver.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! I know, right? I'm so dependable!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Perfect greetings, Bakushin-shin! Be dependable, Bakushin-shin!
Study hard, Bakushin-shin! Run like the wind, Bakushin-shiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And that concludes tonight's Bakushin aerobics! See you tomorrow!
Good niiight!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Seeing is believing. Now I understand. She truly is leading by
example.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have a much better understanding of what school life means to her
this way than I would've gotten through an interview.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A deeper understanding will help us when it comes to deciding on our
motif. I suggest that we continue with this method, following a day in
the life of each of our helpers.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I'm hella tired...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why are you guys here? Oh yeah, it's that thing today, right?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nom, nom... This burger is bussin'! And the weather is giving me life! Today just hits different! ...WAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Jordan's Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Shut up. Why're you shouting?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I forgot my assignment for fifth period! Oh snap!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hold up, that's adorbs! I want it! Ah, I don't have enough money.

text_block_list.name: Jordan's Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Yo Jordan, did you chip a nail just now?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? OMG you're right! My nails are the secret to my success... so
let's hit up the nail care aisle.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
"Has a strong interest in beauty. Is particularly proactive about nail
care. Also has an impressive number of friends." I see.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm the last one, right? I'll do my best! Um, hope I can help!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Morning, Flower! Sorry, could you help me with the assignment we got
yesterday? I don't get it at all!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, sure! Of course! If you're okay with me doing it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I always bring my lunch with me. When the weather's nice, I eat out in
the courtyard!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And actually... I've brought lunch for you both today too, so would
you like to eat with me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've been borrowing a little plot here to grow strawberries! I'm hoping
we can all enjoy them together when spring comes around!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I usually stop by to check on them on the way to training. Am I doing
this right? I hope it's actually helping.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Hehe. The leaves look nice and healthy. Do you manage
this plot all by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Mostly, yes. But sometimes, like just before winter, it's too hard to do
it on my own. I wish I didn't have to ask for help...
